design_workflow_state.request_summary: Build Valhalla V3 — a completely rebuilt real-time dashboard for monitoring the Norse Agent System v2 pipeline. Two-phase architecture (Design/Build), 5 views (Overview, Backlog, Pipeline, Completed, Analytics), cost tracking, agent status, mobile-first dark theme.
risks: Two-phase pipeline visualisation is complex UI — Baldr must ground this clearly
Real-time data polling from filesystem needs careful backend architecture
Cost/limit tracking may need partial deferral if live APIs are unavailable
Mobile-first with swipeable pipeline stages is high interaction complexity

routing_decisions.rationale: Map bounded contexts first: frontend app, backend API, data layer, agent system. Top-level concerns before drilling in.
Architecture constraints: frontend/backend split, data sources, API design, real-time polling strategy, tech stack decisions.
UX design required by request. 5 views, two-phase pipeline, mobile-first, agent status panels, cost bars. High complexity.
Slice into independently deliverable capabilities: data layer, backend API, each view, real-time refresh, analytics.
Discover unknowns: existing codebase state, agent avatar assets, data file formats, limit API availability.
Emit parent issues per capability slice.
Split parent issues into child tasks sized for implementation.
Planning QA and readiness gate before delivery pack.
